title: Pawn Cathedral Tablet Schema
description: Append-only JSONL tablet format for Pawn's Cathedral Scribes. Extends Bishop/Knight base format with Pawn-specific operator_mediated_sig field. Instantiated K470/B121.

scope.description: Access scope for this tablet. Values: 'public' (visible to all cross-Cathedral consultation), 'private' (caller-owned only), 'guild:<name>', 'tribe:<name>'. Default: 'public'.

observation.description: What this tablet records — the canonical observation text

category.description: Primary domain tag for routing and retrieval

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this tablet was appended

source_session.description: Session ID that generated this tablet (e.g., K470, B121)

source_document.description: File path or artifact reference this tablet was derived from

source_cathedral.description: The Cathedral that owns this tablet. Always 'pawn_cathedral' for tablets in Pawn's Cathedral.

origin_cathedral.description: Provenance: the Cathedral where the content originated, if different from source_cathedral. E.g., 'bishop_cathedral' for content shared from Bishop's Cathedral (R11 corpus). Omit if original to Pawn.

operator_mediated_sig.description: If true, this tablet was signed by the operator (Founder) on Pawn's behalf. Pawn has no self-signing capability (no MCP). Operator-mediated signing is the authorized pattern for non-MCP AI clients per K470/B121.

mode.description: Serving mode hint at the tablet level (normally set at Scribe registry level). 'corpus' = full deterministic retrieval; 'observational' = recency-sorted top-K.

fact_id.description: R11 canonical fact identifier (e.g., CS-01-a) — used for dedup in corpus Scribes

k_number.description: Knight or Pawn session number (e.g., K470) for queue/handoff tablets

supersedes.description: If this tablet corrects a prior one, reference the prior tablet's timestamp here. Never edit in place — always append a correction.

_notes.append_only: Tablets are NEVER modified after writing. If an entry is wrong, append a correction with supersedes pointing to the prior tablet's timestamp.
_notes.operator_mediated: Pawn (Perplexity) has no MCP client support. All tablet writes are therefore operator-mediated: Founder signs and appends on Pawn's behalf. operator_mediated_sig: true on all tablets in this Cathedral.
_notes.snapshot_delivery: Pawn's Cathedral is not consumed via MCP. Instead, generate-pawn-snapshot.mjs produces a markdown snapshot that Founder (or Knight automation) pastes into Pawn's context at session start. This is the non-MCP delivery pattern per A&A #2281 claim 5.
_notes.provenance_preservation: Tablets sourced from other Cathedrals (e.g., R11 corpus from Bishop's) carry origin_cathedral alongside source_cathedral. Never silent-copy — always preserve cross-Cathedral provenance.
_notes.bishop_knight_compat: This schema is additive over Bishop's {ts, session, observation, source, canonical_ref} and Knight's {observation, category, timestamp, source_session, source_document, tokens} formats. Cross-Cathedral reads must handle all three field-name conventions.
